# CrimsonARB — AI Delta-Neutral Yield Vault
# Bayou City Blockchain LLC | Houston, TX
# https://crimsonarb.com

## What is CrimsonARB?
CrimsonARB is an AI-augmented delta-neutral yield vault on Solana that captures funding rate arbitrage from Drift Protocol perpetual markets. It evaluates SOL-PERP, BTC-PERP, and ETH-PERP simultaneously each hour.

## The Core Innovation
Proof of No-Trade: Every trading decision — including every skipped opportunity — is documented with AI reasoning in plain English. 79% of opportunities are skipped. Every skip is published.

## How It Works
- Sentry Brain AI evaluates funding rate alpha each cycle
- AgentSentry circuit-breaker screens before execution
- EXECUTE: position opened, AgentSentry approved
- SKIP: opportunity passed, reasoning documented
- GUARD: circuit breaker fired, capital protected

## Decision Types
1. EXECUTE - Position opened after passing all checks
2. SKIP - Opportunity declined with documented reasoning
3. GUARD - Circuit breaker blocked execution to protect capital

## Key Metrics (Devnet Simulation)
- Simulated APY: 23.4%
- Sharpe Ratio: 2.41
- Max Drawdown: 0.00% (delta-neutral, architecturally guaranteed)
- Markets monitored: SOL-PERP, BTC-PERP, ETH-PERP
- Funding capture rate: 73.2%
- Total evaluations: 5,541 (1,847 cycles x 3 markets)
- Skip rate: 79%

## Delta-Neutral Strategy
- Long spot position (e.g., SOL)
- Short perpetual position (e.g., SOL-PERP on Drift)
- Net price exposure: zero
- Income: funding rate payments from shorts
- Max drawdown: 0% (architecturally guaranteed)

## Built On
- Ranger Finance Voltr SDK (vault management layer)
- Drift Protocol (dRiftyHA39MWEi3m9aunc5MzRF1JYuBsbn6VPcn33UH)
- Solana devnet (mainnet pending security audit)
- AgentSentry (agentsentry.net) for pre-finality screening

## Anchor Programs (Solana Devnet)
- ctoken-market-program: Liquidity pool with cToken mint/burn
- custom-adaptor-program: CPI bridge to Ranger vault

## Ecosystem Position
Part of Bayou City Blockchain LLC's 10-product Solana ecosystem. Treasury yield layer for SPLit (splitsol.net) and RapidPay (4rapidpay.com) settlement volume.

## Related Products
- AgentSentry (agentsentry.net) - AI treasury circuit-breaker
- SPLit (splitsol.net) - Bill splitting on Solana
- RapidPay (4rapidpay.com) - International payments
- BCBlock (bcblock.net) - Parent organization

## API Endpoints
- GET /api/decisions - Retrieve AI decision history
- GET /api/sentry/status - AgentSentry status check
- GET /api/openclaw/metrics - Public metrics for AI search

- Drift Protocol Side Track submission
